semanticEvent.description: Wide shot of a basketball game in progress; Stephen Curry is visible on the court with text overlay questioning a shooting decision.
Close-up of Stephen Curry screaming or yelling passionately; the text overlay remains visible.

Stephen Curry is bent over, holding his thighs, appearing exhausted or distraught in black and white.
